title: Weekend yields 22 drug-related arrests
description: GEORGE NEWS - A total of 22 suspects were...
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS - A total of 22 suspects were arrested on drug-related charges in the Conville area between Saturday 6 April and Monday 8 April.


> Two of these suspects were arrested on Sunday and Monday during patrols in the area.


On Sunday, Conville police members raided a house in July Marakeni Street in Lawaaikamp, when they noticed that a portion of grass next to the house had been disturbed.

"They opened a hole in the ground and inside the hole discovered a Knorrox box [beef cubes box] with 500 Mandrax tablets concealed inside," said Southern Cape police spokesperson Sgt Chris Spies.

A 38-year-old Nigerian man was arrested on the scene.

On Monday, members of the Garden Route District Crime Combatting Team conducted patrols along Fiskaal Street, Conville, when they noticed a suspicious man changing direction when police approached.


> They gave chase and when they caught up with him, proceeded with a search in which they found 88 bankies of tik and nine Mandrax tablets.


The suspect (28) was arrested on a charge of possession of drugs.

Confiscated tik and Mandrax. Photo: Saps

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
